sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/2, start the loading, wait until the hidden text finishes loading, then read it

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to the target URL.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Dynamic Loading Page
workflow.description: Identify the dynamic loading page and initiate the loading process by clicking 'Start'.
triggers: If a button with text 'Start' is visible

workflow.name: Waiting for Content to Load
workflow.description: Wait for the hidden text to finish loading, indicated by a 'Loading...' message.
triggers: If a div with id 'loading' and text 'Loading...' is visible

workflow.name: Content Loaded and Visible
workflow.description: Confirm the hidden text 'Hello World!' has finished loading and is now visible.
triggers: If the text 'Hello World!' is visible
actions: Terminate: The hidden text has loaded and is now readable.

issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.
